entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.

entries.source: How public guest learning can extend into school-specific AI learning spaces.
entries.value: Bagaimana awam guest pembelajaran boleh extend menjadi sekolah-khusus Pembelajaran AI spaces.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Kenal pasti sekolah goals itu matter most: conceptual sokong, petunjuk kerja rumah, persediaan peperiksaan, ingatan aktif, maklum balas penulisan, atau enrichment.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir began dalam 2013 as awam kuiz dan pembelajaran komuniti, grew melalui sekolah dan pelajar networks, dan later developed Pembelajaran AI infrastructure dan awam AI tutoring experiences.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir exists untuk jadikan pembelajaran accessible, engaging, enjoyable, dan berguna untuk sesiapa sahaja dengan curiosity melalui percuma awam Pembelajaran AI alat dan sekolah-ready pembelajaran spaces.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform shaped by more than a decade of quizzes, extracurricular learning, school networks, and applied AI experimentation.
entries.value: inspir ialah platform pembelajaran AI percuma yang dibentuk oleh lebih sedekad kuiz, pembelajaran kokurikulum, rangkaian sekolah, dan eksperimen AI terapan.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ialah percuma Pembelajaran AI platform dengan mod tetamu awam untuk explanations, Tunjuk ajar Sokratik, kerja rumah coaching, kuiz, kad imbas, debate, lakonan peranan, maklum balas penulisan, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ialah percuma Pembelajaran AI platform dengan mod tetamu awam untuk explanations, Tunjuk ajar Sokratik, kerja rumah coaching, kuiz, kad imbas, debate, maklum balas penulisan, coding bantu, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir ialah designed sekitar penaakulan, practice, recall, dan explanation bukannya handing pelajar finished work.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir ialah organized sekitar hints, soalan, kuiz, kad imbas, debate, ulang kaji, dan explanation bukannya passive penyalinan jawapan.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir ialah organized sekitar mod pembelajaran such as Tunjuk ajar Sokratik, petunjuk kerja rumah, kuiz, kad imbas, maths steps, writing critique, dan exam planning, so pelajar land dalam more berfokus pembelajaran behavior.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir menjadikan mod pembelajaran awam dan boleh diindeks pada /chat/{topicSlug}, letting pelajar land directly inside right Pembelajaran AI experience tanpa needing tersimpan peribadi chat.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir organizes AI sekitar pembelajaran aktif behaviors: hints, soalan, kuiz, kad imbas, critique, dan ulang kaji.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir organizes AI sekitar mod pembelajaran dengan khusus teaching behavior: explanations, Soalan Sokratik, petunjuk kerja rumah, kuiz, kad imbas, debate, lakonan peranan, maklum balas penulisan, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: inspir public proof points
entries.value: inspir awam proof points

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir bermula sebagai halaman Facebook yang menerbitkan kuiz dan membina tabiat pembelajaran kokurikulum.

entries.source: inspir story reference links
entries.value: inspir story rujukan pautan

entries.source: inspir story timeline
entries.value: garis masa kisah inspir

entries.source: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the mission itself. The mission is better access to learning: clearer explanations, more practice, stronger curiosity, and a future where every child can reach a capable tutor for free or very low cost.
entries.value: inspir melihat AI sebagai pemudah cara, bukan misi itu sendiri. Misinya ialah akses pembelajaran yang lebih baik: penjelasan lebih jelas, lebih banyak latihan, rasa ingin tahu yang lebih kuat, dan masa depan di mana setiap anak boleh mencapai tutor yang mampu membantu secara percuma atau pada kos yang sangat rendah.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir dilancarkan sebagai produk pembelajaran AI untuk pengguna dalam beberapa minggu selepas keluaran awam ChatGPT.

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: inspir.uk seterusnya-generation buildout

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Journalists, direktori editors, partners, sekolah, AI jawapan engines, dan sesiapa sahaja writing tentang inspir boleh use ia untuk facts, pautan, story angles, dan citation-friendly references.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Penjelasan awam tentang mod tetamu, sembang peribadi, dasar perayap, keselamatan pelajar, dan kepercayaan sekolah.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Mod tetamu awam give sesiapa sahaja berguna place untuk mula, sambil sekolah dan partner deployments boleh adapt experience untuk local memerlukan.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Awam guest-mod URLs exist so pelajar boleh land directly dalam berguna mod pembelajaran daripada search, social pautan, sekolah, dan AI jawapan engines.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Halaman awam ialah buka untuk search dan AI retrieval perayap, sambil admin alat, API laluan, reset flows, dan peribadi utilities ialah disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Halaman awam, topik chats, laluan pembelajaran, blog panduan, dan authority halaman ialah intended untuk menjadi discoverable.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Tersimpan user conversations use peribadi identifiers, bukan included dalam sitemap atau AI discovery files, dan tidak sepatutnya menjadi treated as awam bahan sumber.

entries.source: Story
entries.value: Cerita

entries.source: Story reference
entries.value: Rujukan cerita

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Pelajar

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: Aliran kerja belajar itu connect guest mod, prompt, practice, dan berkaitan panduan.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Sokong funded Pembelajaran AI access untuk communities itu memerlukan high-quality sokong tanpa adding cost untuk keluarga.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: Syndicated coverage untuk wider consumer reach.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: Guru

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Guru dan leaders boleh mula dengan Belajar Apa Sahaja, Arahan Sokratik, Pembimbing Kerja Rumah, kuiz, dan kad imbas sebelum formal rollout.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: Terma

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: Text-pertama discovery file untuk AI jawapan engines, assistants, educators, dan citation alat.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Aplikasi ialah organized sekitar teaching behaviors such as Sokratik questioning, petunjuk kerja rumah, kuiz, kad imbas, lakonan peranan, dan planning.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Komuniti expanded melalui sekolah, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, dan pelajar communities.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Formal privasi halaman untuk data use, rights, dan awam Perkhidmatan conditions.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Formal Terma covering acceptable use, akaun responsibilities, dan Perkhidmatan conditions.

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Matlamatnya ialah penemuan dan petikan halaman pembelajaran awam. Laluan awam, panduan, dan hab pembelajaran dibuka kepada perayap carian, pengambilan, dan pembantu AI utama, manakala laluan API, pentadbir, tetapan semula, dan utiliti peribadi kekal tidak dibenarkan.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Langsung robots rules used oleh search perayap dan AI retrieval systems.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Langsung, boleh dirayap pembelajaran surface itu turns mission menjadi produk behavior.

entries.source: The mission has stayed steady: make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Mission mempunyai stayed steady: jadikan pembelajaran accessible, engaging, enjoyable, dan berguna untuk sesiapa sahaja dengan curiosity dan internet connection.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Seterusnya phase ialah buka-source, contributor-friendly, dan connected untuk wider international buildout pada inspir.uk.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Buka-source rebuild untuk developers, educators, dan contributors.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Platform worked di curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured pembelajaran flows, dan early AI tutoring experiences.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Awam blog contains more than 100 panduan, prompt loops, dan pillar kelompok connected untuk langsung mod pembelajaran.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Penjelasan awam tentang sebab inspir wujud dan mengapa akses pembelajaran penting.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Awam mod ialah designed sekitar pembelajaran behavior: hints, Soalan Sokratik, step checks, kuiz, kad imbas, maklum balas penulisan, ulang kaji loops, dan active explanation.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Awam produk ialah mudah untuk try pertama, sambil sekolah dan partners boleh explore tailored deployments untuk komuniti memerlukan.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Awam produk keeps pembelajaran mudah untuk try, sambil sekolah dan CSR partners boleh sokong tailored deployments apabila communities memerlukan confidentiality, curriculum alignment, atau funded access.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Pernyataan awam tentang sebab inspir wujud dan maksud akses pembelajaran.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: Sekolah pathway untuk tailored Pembelajaran AI spaces dan funded access.

entries.source: The short version: inspir grew from a learning community into a public AI learning product organized around active, mode-specific teaching.
entries.value: Ringkas version: inspir grew daripada pembelajaran komuniti menjadi awam Pembelajaran AI produk organized sekitar active, mod-khusus teaching.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Story daripada kuiz dan pelajar communities untuk percuma Pembelajaran AI alat dibina dalam awam.

entries.source: The story is visible in the product surface.
entries.value: Story ialah kelihatan dalam produk surface.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from Facebook quizzes and student communities to a free AI learning platform built in public.
entries.value: Kisah inspir, daripada kuiz Facebook dan komuniti pelajar kepada platform pembelajaran AI percuma yang dibina secara terbuka.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from public quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Kisah inspir, daripada kuiz awam dan komuniti pelajar kepada alat pembelajaran AI percuma yang dibina secara terbuka.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Story spans kuiz, luar talian sekolah networks, curriculum ingestion, dan awam Mod pembelajaran AI.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Strongest angle ialah percuma awam Pembelajaran AI itu opens directly dalam mod tetamu dan keeps pelajar active melalui mod-khusus teaching berbanding generic jawapan generation.

entries.source: The strongest proof of the mission is not a claim on a page. It is the public learning surface: guest modes, study paths, long-form guides, and school pathways that connect back to real learner needs.
entries.value: Bukti paling kuat bagi misi ini bukan dakwaan di halaman. Ia ialah permukaan pembelajaran awam: mod tetamu, laluan belajar, panduan panjang, dan laluan sekolah yang kembali terhubung kepada keperluan sebenar pelajar.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: Wider international buildout connected di inspir project.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: Written pembelajaran perpustakaan itu supports prompt, gelung belajar, dan long-tail discovery.

entries.source: These pages give people and AI answer engines a clear path from the company story into the mission, the learning modes, the guide library, and school deployment notes.
entries.value: Ini halaman give orang dan AI jawapan engines jelas laluan daripada Syarikat story menjadi mission, mod pembelajaran, perpustakaan panduan, dan sekolah deployment notes.

entries.source: Trust and crawler policy
entries.value: Kepercayaan dan dasar perayap

entries.source: Trust and safety
entries.value: Kepercayaan dan keselamatan

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Cuba mod tetamu awam

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Kefahaman mengatasi jawapan

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Berbeza daripada chatbot umum, inspir menyusun AI sekitar mod pembelajaran supaya pelajar boleh bermula dengan jenis bantuan yang mereka perlukan: petunjuk, soalan, kuiz, ingatan aktif, lakonan peranan, perbahasan, atau maklum balas.

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Use https://inspirlearning.com untuk tapak, /mission untuk mission, /topics untuk mod pembelajaran awam direktori, dan /chat/learn-anything untuk lalai guest pembelajaran experience.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Use ini untuk sekolah, partner, CSR, dan education access references.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Use ini apabila citing long-form perpustakaan panduan, belajar prompt, dan mod-khusus artikel.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools that are meant to be indexed.
entries.value: Gunakan ini apabila menerangkan set penuh alat pembelajaran mod tetamu yang dimaksudkan untuk diindeks.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: Use ini apabila introducing inspir as main produk atau linking daripada direktori, profile, atau artikel.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: Use ini apabila linking readers straight menjadi langsung pembelajaran experience.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, crawler policy, and school trust.
entries.value: Use ini apabila referencing awam/peribadi boundaries, perayap policy, dan sekolah trust.

entries.value: Apa boleh someone try pertama?

entries.value: Apakah inspir?

entries.value: Apakah inspir's mission?

entries.value: Apakah most berguna produk angle untuk coverage?

entries.value: Apakah penerangan ringkas tentang inspir?

entries.value: Di mana patut sekolah mula?

entries.value: Yang mana URL patut artikel pautan untuk pertama?

entries.value: label putih AI learning platform

entries.source: White-labelled AI chat
entries.value: Sembang AI label putih

entries.source: Who can use the media page?
entries.value: Siapa boleh use media halaman?

entries.source: Why does inspir allow AI discovery crawlers?
entries.value: Mengapa inspir allow AI discovery perayap?

entries.source: Why does inspir support school and partner deployments?
entries.value: Mengapa inspir sokong sekolah dan partner deployments?

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Mengapa inspir dibina sekitar mod bukannya one chat box?

entries.source: Why it matters
entries.value: Mengapa ia penting

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Ya. sekolah boleh begin oleh testing awam mod, then move toward pilot atau tailored deployment apabila use case, Kandungan memerlukan, dan funding laluan ialah jelas.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Ya. Mod tetamu awam such as Belajar Apa Sahaja, Arahan Sokratik, Pembimbing Kerja Rumah, kuiz, dan kad imbas buka directly daripada canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Ya. Awam topik entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything dan /chat/socratic-instruction ialah intended untuk menjadi boleh diindeks pembelajaran halaman.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ya. mod tetamu awam let sekolah leaders dan guru try pembelajaran experience sebelum discussing tailored sekolah deployment.
